---
title: "Getting started"
toc: true
---

## Install

```julia
using Pkg
Pkg.add(url = "https://github.com/joshday/GoogleMapsAPI.jl")
```

## Authenticate

Every function reads `ENV["GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY"]` by default. Export it in
your shell:

```sh
export GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY="your-key-here"
```

Or pass `key = "..."` (or a preconfigured `client = GoogleMapsClient(...)`)
to any call.

## First call

```julia
using GoogleMapsAPI

r = geocode("1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA")
r.results[1].geometry.location   # (lat = ..., lng = ...)

route = compute_routes(
    (35.9132, -79.0822),            # Carrboro, NC
    (38.9805, -77.0915);            # Bethesda, MD
    routing_preference = "TRAFFIC_AWARE_OPTIMAL",
    departure_time     = "2026-04-27T08:00:00-04:00",
)
parse_duration(route.routes[1].duration)   # seconds
route.routes[1].distanceMeters             # meters
```

## Reuse a client

For longer-running scripts, construct a `GoogleMapsClient` once so that
retry / rate-limit state is shared across calls:

```julia
c = GoogleMapsClient(
    key                    = ENV["GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY"],
    timeout                = 30,
    retry_timeout          = 60,
    queries_per_second     = 60,
    queries_per_minute     = 6000,
    retry_over_query_limit = true,
    experience_id          = "my-analytics-id",
)

geocode("1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA"; client = c)
elevation((27.9881, 86.9250); client = c)
```

Per-call overrides (`key=`, `timeout=`) do **not** mutate the shared client;
they share the rate-limit state.

Enterprise signing uses `client_id` + `client_secret`:

```julia
c = GoogleMapsClient(
    client_id     = "gme-myorg",
    client_secret = "vNIXE0xscrmjlyV-12Nj_BvUPaw=",
)
```

## Exceptions

- `ApiError(status, message)` — non-OK status in the response envelope
  (e.g. `"OVER_QUERY_LIMIT"`, `"REQUEST_DENIED"`).
- `HTTPError(status)` — unexpected HTTP status on endpoints without an
  envelope.
- `TransportError(cause)` — network / DNS / unexpected exception.
- `RequestTimeout()` — total elapsed time exceeded `client.retry_timeout`.

## Where to next

- [Plotting](plotting.qmd) — `mapplot`, and using any response directly with
  GeoInterface or GeoMakie.
- [Types](types.qmd) — `features(response)` turns any response into a
  normalised iterable of `GMFeature`s.
